Mines of Moria.description: Ancient pillars rise from the dark, their carvings worn by centuries. The air tastes of stone and shadow. Tunnels branch in every direction.

item.name: Seeing Stone
item.description: A palantir that burns with cold inner light, showing glimpses of distant places.

West Wing.description: A vaulted chamber, its far wall collapsed. Wind moans through the gap, carrying the faint scent of pine from somewhere far above.

item.name: Lothlorien Bow
item.description: A slender elven bow carved from mallorn wood, strung with a thread of starlight.

North Hall.description: The ceiling arches high overhead, lost in darkness. Dwarf-runes are carved into the threshold stones, their meaning long forgotten.

item.name: Staff of Gandalf
item.description: A twisted length of ancient wood, warm to the touch and crackling with dormant power.

North Bunker.description: A stout guardroom, its iron door rusted open. Weapon racks line the walls, all stripped bare save for one glinting suit of armour.

item.name: Mythril Armor
item.description: A coat of rings woven from true silver — lighter than silk, harder than steel.

South Hall.description: Water trickles down the far wall into a shallow pool that mirrors the faint glow of bioluminescent lichen.

item.name: Light of Galadriel
item.description: A crystal phial filled with the light of Earendil's star, steady and unwavering in the dark.

South Bunker.description: A cramped storeroom, its shelves rotted to splinters. Something valuable was left behind in the rush to flee.

item.name: Helmet of Eowyn
item.description: A winged helm of Rohirric craft, dented from battle but still strong.

East Wing.description: Broad steps lead up into a gallery that once oversaw a great forge. The forge is cold now, but heat from the deeper earth still rises underfoot.

item.name: Sword of Gondor
item.description: A long blade etched with the seven stars of Gondor, its edge still keen despite the ages.

Dungeon.description: The Bridge of Khazad-dum stretches before you. Heat billows from the chasm below. A vast shadow rises — wings spread, whip cracking. THE BALROG AWAITS.
